title: Browser Extension Core (Service Worker & Content Script)

classes.name: ServiceWorker
fields: panelPorts: Map<tabId, Set<Port>>  // active DevTools panel connections
devtoolsTabs: Set<tabId>  // tabs with DevTools open
methods: updateBadge(tabId): void  // sets badge text + color via chrome.action
notifyPanels(tabId, message): void  // forwards message to all panel ports
buildScanConfig(): Promise<ScanConfig>  // derives config from settings
ensureContentScriptInjected(tabId): Promise<boolean>  // on-demand injection via chrome.scripting
sendScanToTab(tabId): Promise<void>  // injects CS if needed then sends scan message
tearDownTab(tabId): Promise<void>  // resets state, removes badge, clears panelPorts
event_handlers: chrome.runtime.onMessage  // scan, findings, toggle-overlays, get-state, overlays-toggled, page-pointer-active, inject-fallback, disabled-rules-changed
chrome.webNavigation.onCompleted  // re-scan on page navigation if DevTools open
chrome.tabs.onRemoved  // clean up tabState and panelPorts

classes.name: TabState
fields: injected: boolean  // detector injected in page context
csInjected: boolean  // content-script.js injected into tab

classes.name: ContentScript
fields: injected: boolean  // detector loaded in page context
pendingScan: boolean  // scan queued before detector ready
lastPageActive: number  // timestamp for pointer throttle
methods: injectAndScan(): void  // injects detector/detect.js via <script> tag or fallback
sendScanCommand(): void  // postMessage scan command to page context
event_handlers: window.addEventListener('message')  // impeccable-results → sendMessage findings, impeccable-overlays-toggled → sendMessage overlays-toggled, impeccable-ready → sendScanCommand if pendingScan
document.addEventListener('pointermove')  // throttled, sends page-pointer-active to SW

key_relationships: ServiceWorker uses Settings  (reads via getSettings, consumed by buildScanConfig)
ServiceWorker uses ScanConfig (produced by buildScanConfig, sent to ContentScript)
ServiceWorker depends_on ContentScript  (injects via chrome.scripting, sends messages)
ContentScript depends_on Detector  (injects detector/detect.js into page MAIN world via <script> tag or chrome.scripting fallback)
ContentScript bridges ServiceWorker <-> Detector  (postMessage in both directions)
message_flow: Panel/Popup → SW.onMessage('scan') → sendScanToTab → ensureContentScriptInjected → CS.onMessage('scan') → injectAndScan
injectAndScan → injects <script src=detector/detect.js> → page fires impeccable-ready → sendScanCommand → postMessage(scan, config)
Detector → postMessage(impeccable-results) → CS.window.onMessage → SW.onMessage('findings') → updateBadge + notifyPanels + broadcast
Panel.port.onMessage('toggle-overlays') → SW → chrome.tabs.sendMessage(toggle-overlays) → CS → postMessage(toggle-overlays) → Detector
Detector → postMessage(impeccable-overlays-toggled) → CS → SW.onMessage('overlays-toggled') → notifyPanels + broadcast
DevTools opens → chrome.runtime.connect(impeccable-devtools-{tabId}) → SW registers devtoolsTabs entry
Panel opens → chrome.runtime.connect(impeccable-panel-{tabId}) → SW adds to panelPorts, sends current state, triggers scan if no findings
Tab closes → chrome.tabs.onRemoved → delete tabState + panelPorts
Navigation → webNavigation.onCompleted → reset state, notifyPanels('navigated'), re-scan if wasActive
port_names: impeccable-sidebar-{tabId}   // Elements panel sidebar (treated same as panel port)
important_notes: Content script is injected ON-DEMAND only (removed from manifest static content_scripts) — minimizes always-on footprint
csInjected flag prevents double-injection across SW restarts; page reload resets it
Detector runs in MAIN world (needs getComputedStyle, styleSheets.cssRules) — content script runs in ISOLATED world and bridges via window.postMessage
CSP fallback: if <script> inject fails, CS sends inject-fallback to SW which uses chrome.scripting with world:'MAIN'
SW tearDownTab uses async/await to keep SW alive in MV3 (setTimeout unreliable before termination)
SPA navigation handled in content script (popstate/hashchange); full navigations handled in SW via webNavigation.onCompleted
